## AbstractQuery.index() method

Specified index will be used when performing query related operations

**Signature:**

```typescript
index(idx: string): this;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

idx


</td><td>

string


</td><td>

index name


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

this


## Example


```ts
const query = new Query(idb, "store-name");
const data = await query.find({}).index('custom_index').exec();
```
